title: Game Rules Menu
description: Set game rules in-game with a nice menu.
body:
## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)


# **Game Rules Menu**
### Since the features of this mod were added to the game in Update 26.1, the mod will no longer be updated in future versions

Game Rules Menu lets you tweak every gamerule in Minecraft through a clean, in-game interface. No commands, no hassle - just pure control at your fingertips. Perfect for mapmakers, server owners, or anyone who wants full rule over their world.

## Easily accessible, fancy menu
You can access it from the Pause menu! _(You can also type **"/trigger openGameRules"** in the chat)_

![Gui](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaGNlZ2h0ZHllbXA2Nmpxbm56ZmIwaGltdzZmc3kzaW10NzM1eDB0aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/XvmNsQeSJBwJd0NnUm/giphy.gif)

## All Languages in Game
The “Game Rules Menu” is available in all languages, it uses your selected language in the game!

![Languages](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZXJwN3g1ZnFxajZmenBueGJ3ajNvdHlyZ2RtdjQ0cHpodjJ4YXowcCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/cKjzh23QKwWdnGqmHE/giphy.gif)


## All Gamerules
From this menu you can access all gamerules and change them as you wish. You can press the save button to save them or press the cancel button to cancel the changes you have made.



### You must be op to use the menu!

**This is just a datapack, so there are some restrictions on the menu. You can use [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/nocc) to remove the op command warning and you can use [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-dialog-warning) to remove the annoying warning at the top right.**


**Your feedback is important to us. You can write on Discord. Discord name: tpcoffline**
